'''Gorb Drig''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] owner of a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Phorliss]]. His son was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during one of the Houks' wars. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he took [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] on as a waitress in his cantina. A few weeks later, he was murdered by several [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] thugs during an extortion attempt.

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 4]] {{1st}}
